# 5SVG

> Free SVG brand logos and icons for crafts, design, and the web.

5SVG (https://5svg.com) is an independent library of production-ready vector logos. Browse, search, copy SVG code, or download files with no signup.

## Main pages

- Home: https://5svg.com/
- Library (search & grid): https://5svg.com/library
- Browse all logos A–Z: https://5svg.com/browse
- Topics (social, AI, Cricut, etc.): https://5svg.com/tags
- Pack icon details: https://5svg.com/more/{pack}/icon/{id} (top 50 per pack)
- Icon detail pages: https://5svg.com/icon/{slug} (e.g. https://5svg.com/icon/discord)
- Categories: https://5svg.com/directory/{category}
- More icon packs: https://5svg.com/more
- License & trademarks: https://5svg.com/license
- About: https://5svg.com/about

## Sitemaps

- Index: https://5svg.com/sitemap.xml
- Main pages: https://5svg.com/sitemap-main.xml
- Icon pages: https://5svg.com/sitemap-icons.xml

## Build

- Production build runs `pnpm build:og-icons` to generate PNG Open Graph previews at `/og/icons/{slug}.png`.

## Usage notes

- Brand logos are trademarks of their respective owners; check official brand guidelines before commercial use.
- Favorites are stored locally in the browser only.
